calendar.matters:
Amended Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Sep-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kirsten Wolff, for petitioner Patrick McCabe.

The Court noted that he was aware an amended petition was filed, and that he intends to grant the amended petition. He directed counsel to provide him with an amended order. Ms. Wolff stated that she would do so. The Court partially granted the petition (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Chan. (Not reported)

Amended Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets And Terminating Trust
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Aug-16-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-22-2016 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Kirsten Wolff for (petitioner) Patrick McCabe who is present in court.

The Court stated that this is a petition to terminate and allow the distribution of trust assets, that the trust is not established and has no assets in it and asked if it is appropriate for an advance determination. Ms. Wolff stated that they are here now for efficiency, that it is a CRT trust, that the assets are currently in the marital trust, that they have been working with the beneficiaries as to how to implement this trust, that if there is a U.S. trustee the sister will be subject to high taxes, that she is in Guernsey, that they tried to obtain a trustee in Guernsey but the fees are very high, that this would impact the interest of all of the beneficiaries and that the beneficiaries have agreed to terminate this trust. The Court stated that the trust is not formed and therefor cannot be terminated. Ms. Wolff stated that the trust would be formed pursuant to the Power of Appointment. The Court stated that they are really trying to reform the will. Ms. Wolff stated that they are just collapsing two steps. The Court stated that they are asking the court to step on a step that does not exist and that it does not know how it can take action. Ms. Wolff stated that it is a practical action and that the alternative is to transfer the house into the trust and get a Guernsey trustee. The Court stated that then it would have something to work with and that it does not see how to terminate and distribute what does not exist. Ms. Wolff stated that whether or not the trust is funded it exists. The Court stated that it has not been established/funded, that in effect they are saying that it did not make sense to use the Power of Appointment so are asking the court to approve a different avenue. Ms. Wolff stated that the trust can exist without being funded. The Court stated that they are asking for the trust to be terminated and for an order as to what happens to what is in it. Ms. Wolff replied that the trust exists even if it is not funded and that it is more efficient for the beneficiaries to agree to the distribution. The Court asked why not do this through probate in Guernsey. Ms. Wolff replied that it is not part of the estate and that the Guernsey probate court has nothing to do with the CRT. The Court stated that it is not inclined to grant the petition but that it will deny the petition without prejudice to be brought before the court again when the assets are in the trust.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

Petition For Termination Of Trust
Off Calendar Mar-08-2016 Continued To Mar-22-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
